## Description

Brief description of the changes made.

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`cargo test`, `pnpm test`)
- [ ] Code follows style guidelines (`cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy`, `pnpm check`)
- [ ] SPDX license header added to new files: `// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT OR Apache-2.0`
- [ ] i18n updated if UI strings changed
- [ ] Tested on target platform(s)
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Translation
